base_roll.description: Roll 2D6. On 9+, a Unique Individual is present (in addition to normal enemies)

interested_parties.description: Add +1 if fighting opponents from the Interested Parties Subtable

exclusions.invasion_battles: No Unique Individual roll for Invasion battles
exclusions.roving_threats: No Unique Individual roll for Roving Threats (standard/hardcore only)

insanity_mode.description: Insanity: A Unique Individual is always present, even for Roving Threats

double_check.description: Roll 2D6 without modifiers. On 11-12, TWO Unique Individuals are present

general_rules.additional: Unique Individual is always in addition to normally encountered enemies
general_rules.guardian_attachment: If the Unique Individual has Guardian AI, attach to Lieutenant if present; otherwise random non-Specialist
general_rules.types_table: See enemy_types.json unique_individuals array for D100 type table
